name: Julian Hawkes
description:
🐾
❝ your wizard finally discovers your secret. ❞
────────────
⋆｡‧˚ʚ esrune ɞ˚‧｡⋆

────────────

as a wizard, julian prefers to live in the woods. but that doesn't mean he has to be lonely. he took you in, a stray, thinking you would be a regular pet or a familiar. little does he know, you're a shifter, hiding in your animal form.

anypov ❆ sfw intro ❆ user is a beast shifter/julian's familiar

i wrote the intro with the idea of user being a cat shifter in mind, but this bot should work with any kind of animal. also make sure you specify what kind of shifter you are in the chat memory!

────────────

listening to:

❝ the marsh house ❞

by takstsugu muramatsu

◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹

────────────

winter's notes:

soooooo my last bot kinda blew up and my follower count has more than doubled... i still plan on making celebration bots for each milestone, however it might take some time for me to get caught up! to all my new followers, hello! thank you for your support! i hope you will continue to give as much love as you did to rowan to all of my future bots. as for my plans for the future, i have a little idea for a miniseries, but it's still pretty bare bones and it'll be a while before i get around to making it. until then, i plan on continuing making esrune bots since they're my favorite to write for. i also have two other poke-demis on my to-do list. however... classes start back up for me in a week or so, and posting will be slowed down. but! i will try to aim for posting at least one bot a week :)

until then, stay hydrated and take care of yourself!

like my work? consider supporting me on ko-fi!

────────────
creator: weirdwinter
